title: netcoredbg Debug Configuration
description: Launch or attach to .NET applications through Samsung netcoredbg.

request.description: Whether to launch a new .NET process or attach to an existing process.

program.description: Path to the .dll or executable to debug. Usually $ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT/bin/Debug/<tfm>/<project>.dll.

project.description: Path to a .csproj file. When provided without program, the extension resolves the output DLL automatically. Use the dotnet debug locator for automatic builds.

configuration.description: MSBuild configuration used when resolving a project output path.

targetFramework.description: Target framework used when resolving a project output path. Defaults to TargetFramework or the first TargetFrameworks entry from the .csproj.

runtimeIdentifier.description: Optional runtime identifier segment used in the output path, for example linux-x64 or win-x64.

assemblyName.description: Optional assembly name override. Defaults to AssemblyName from the .csproj or the project file name.

stopAtEntry.description: Stop at the entry point before running user code.

justMyCode.description: netcoredbg/VS Code style Just My Code option.

sourceFileMap.description: Maps source paths from build/debug symbols to local paths.
